- Added a new "No Preview" option to New Message Notification settings. When enabled, messages from the selected channel will not trigger notifications or appear in the main interface preview.

- Added Wilderness Map Theme 7: Studio Turmoil. After updating to the latest version, you can explore this brand-new area and collect exclusive decorative buildings and other rewards.

- Optimized the Event Checklist interface. Completed events will now appear at the bottom of the

title: Screwdom
notes:
New Event: Puzzle Pieces. Complete levels and collect puzzle pieces to earn special rewards.
New Seasonal: Summer Pass. Enjoy a sunny adventure packed with exclusive rewards.
Bug fixes and performance improvements.

title: Merge Mansion: Puzzles & Story
notes:
Summer has arrived in Hopewell Bay, and there's plenty to look forward to in our latest update!

• Maddie and her friends are gearing up for an exciting soccer watch party.
• Discover and restore the Hallway of Curiosities, our newest area filled with secrets waiting to be uncovered.
• Enjoy a lineup of fun seasonal events and brand-new Season Passes packed with rewards.
• We've also made a variety of improvements and fixes to keep your experience running smoothly.

See you in Hopewell Bay!

title: Candy Crush Soda Saga
notes:
Sodalicious! We update our game every week with exciting levels, improvements to the game, and fun new features. Download the latest version to check it out!
Joining us after a break? Welcome back! New to the game? You’ll be a pro before you know it!

title: Minecraft: Dream it, Build it!

title: Frost & Flame: King of Avalon
notes:
What's New:
 1. Brand new Mist Hero Weapons are now available!
 2. New Lost Relics are now available!

title: SimCity BuildIt
notes:
Experience timeless beauty in our newest Season: Vivid Vienna – City of Elegance!
- Join the Contest of Mayors and advance along the Mayor’s Pass to unlock dazzling Vienna landmarks, including the magnificent Stephansdom.
- Collect Flower Coins and upgrade the grand Gasometer Complex into a stunning piece of modern revitalization.
- Stay tuned for new Events, Limited-Time Buildings, and special rewards throughout the season & create your own imperial masterpiece.

Happy building, Mayors!

title: Mech Arena - Shooting Game
notes:
